rationale: Educ. Code §37.312 addresses governmental liability and immunity. It is wholly unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote:
This subchapter does not:
(1) waive any liability or immunity of a governmental entity or its officers or employees; or
(2) create any liability for or a cause of action against a governmental entity or its officers or employees.
_note: Rule text pertains to liability/immunity; no relationship to homestead exemption amounts.
